summary: Created src/domain/card.ts with Tier union type (Open | Working | Deep), Category union type (Infrastructure | Working Together | Growth and Direction | Feedback and Repair), and Card interface (cardNumber, category, tier, prompt, guidance, flavourText, pairsWith?). Updated src/domain/index.ts barrel to re-export all types using export type syntax (required by verbatimModuleSyntax). Fixed unused variable lint error in test file. All checks pass: typecheck, lint, 71/71 tests.
